projectDescription: Floralé is a handcrafted gift shop web application built with Next.js, featuring a customer-facing storefront with product catalog and WhatsApp-based checkout, and a Supabase-backed admin panel for managing products and categories.
keyFeatures: Customer-facing product catalog with category filtering
Product detail pages with related product suggestions
Persistent cart with per-item notes and quantity management
WhatsApp-based checkout with formatted order message generation
Admin dashboard for CRUD management of products and categories
Image upload to Supabase Storage from the admin panel
Supabase authentication for admin access with Row Level Security
Animated UI with Framer Motion and a warm artisanal aesthetic
publicApiSurface: useCartStore() — Zustand store with addItem, removeItem, updateQuantity, updateNote, clearCart, openDrawer, closeDrawer, toggleDrawer
useToastStore() — Zustand store with addToast, removeToast
